productDisplayName: ANT Kids Girls Solid Beige Short
description: Composition Beige shorts made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides, looped waist, button and zipper closure on the front, pleated panels along the pocket mouths, brand stamp at the back and and stitch detailing in brown Fitting Comfort Wash care Dry clean preferred Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on decorations Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this pretty short from ant is all set to offer absolute all-day comfort for your little girl, while she enjoys with her playmates. The pleated panels and stitch detailing give this short a vacation vibe. Team it with pretty tops or t-shirts and sneakers.
